subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] testing: add nfsd-io-bench NFS server benchmark suite

reviews.author: Ritesh (IBM)
reviews.summary: Reviewer suggested moving the NFS server benchmark suite to xfstests, citing its existing performance testing framework and questioning whether maintaining separate fio-based scripts is necessary.
reviews.raw_body:
Maybe in xfstests? It has tests/perf/, but that just have 1 test.
Maybe others can tell whether it make sense to maintain such fio based
performance benchmarking scripts in there.

-ritesh

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a benchmark suite to test the performance of NFSD I/O modes using fio and the libnfs backend against an NFS server on localhost. The suite includes tests for buffered, direct, and cached I/O modes via NFSD debugfs controls. It also includes scripts to orchestrate the test matrix, parse results from fio JSON output, and configure the NFS export for testing. This patch aims to provide a comprehensive benchmarking tool for evaluating NFSD performance in various scenarios.
